scenarioBundles.label: Baseline
scenarioBundles.description: Current source-backed defaults with payer and patient access both in scope.

scenarioBundles.label: Patient Growth
scenarioBundles.description: Higher patient-app uptake and more multi-app behavior.

scenarioBundles.label: Payer Heavy
scenarioBundles.description: Broader payer coverage and more multi-coverage per patient.

scenarioBundles.label: High Fragmentation
scenarioBundles.description: Patients accumulate more distinct provider relationships over time.

scenarioBundles.label: Cross-Network Mix
scenarioBundles.description: Apps and providers diverge across more network boundaries.

scenarioBundles.label: High Payer Churn
scenarioBundles.description: Higher member churn and more failed deactivations.

scenarioBundles.label: Combined Stress
scenarioBundles.description: Higher app uptake, payer churn, and fragmentation at the same time.

scenarioBundles.label: Low Adoption
scenarioBundles.description: Conservative rollout with lower app and payer participation.

scenarioBundles.label: Encryption Stress
scenarioBundles.description: Endpoint encryption with broad key propagation to stress Proposal C.
